title: UltraStaff
body:
### **UltraStaff**
Advanced staff management & moderation plugin — Spigot/Paper 1.16-1.21


✔ Wiki / Documentation
- Wiki — Complete documentation, guides, and module explanations can be found at: UltraStaff Wiki
- Discord — https://discord.gg/pVkkdf4634

✔ Main Commands


### Command ---------- Description
- /ultrastaff reload ---------- Reload plugin configuration and messages
- /staffmode ---------- Enable or disable staff mode with special tools
- /staffchat [message] ---------- Enable or disable staff-only chat
- /freeze <player> ---------- Freeze a player for moderation
- /alerts ---------- Toggle mining alerts for staff
- /chat <mute/clear> ---------- Manage global chat: mute or clear it
- /fly ---------- Toggle fly mode for staff
- /invsee <player> ---------- View another player's inventory
- /vanish ---------- Toggle invisibility mode



✔ Features

StaffMode — Provides a special mode for staff with interactive tools: 
 - Navigator: Quickly move to players or locations.                        
 - RandomTP: Teleport to a random player.                               
 - Vanish: Become invisible for discreet moderation.                       
 - Fly: Fly freely while moderating.                            
 - MinerTP: View players currently mining in an interactive GUI.                 
 - Freeze: Freeze players and restrict actions while frozen.              
 - InvSee: Inspect the inventory of any player.                 
 - CPS Checker: Check clicks per second for a player.               
- StaffChat — Private chat for staff, optionally logged to console.                 
- Alerts — Detects and notifies staff about block breaks (like diamond or emerald ore) in specified worlds.

✔ Customization & Modules
Messages, item names, colors, and lores for each tool are fully customizable.
Chat control, mining alerts, and moderation tools can be tailored for your server needs.
Compatible with Spigot/Paper 1.16 to 1.21.
